title: MiniWorld
description: This resource pack revives the classic textures of old Mini World, evoking nostalgia for fans of retro block-style gaming. Version focuses on recreating the charm of old-school block textures, with item textures still in progress and creature textures
body:
### Mini World Resource Pack
This resource pack focuses on recreating the visual style of Mini World's version 0.44.2, aiming to bring players a cross-game nostalgic experience.

#### Core Restoration Content:
- **Custom Textures**: Redrawn strictly based on the block and item textures from Mini World v0.44.2, including terrain blocks, tools, weapons, and basic props. Supplementary textures (for elements missing in the original Mini World version) maintain consistent styling.
- **Unique Models**: Restored iconic item models (beds, storage boxes, etc.) using OptiFine's custom model features. **OptiFine of the corresponding version must be installed; otherwise, models may display incorrectly**.
- **Interfaces & Sound Effects**: Recreated the old Mini World GUI layout, font styles, and classic scene sound effects to enhance immersion.

#### Important Notes:
1. Compatibility: Supports Minecraft versions 1.12 to 1.18.2 (automatic pack_format adaptation). Texture misalignment may occur in other versions.
2. Dependency Requirement: Must install OptiFine of the same Minecraft version to prevent color abnormalities in birch leaves, fir leaves, and other textures.
3. Content Disclosure: Some music materials are sourced from other games (due to insufficient original Mini World music files), and some textures are stylized supplements, not directly extracted.

#### Future Plans:
- Complete creature model restoration
- Optimize compatibility for low-end devices
- Expand sound effect coverage for more scenes

If you encounter model glitches or texture abnormalities, please first check your OptiFine installation status.

I will fix issues as soon as possible.
Enjoy reliving the classics in the blocky world!
